name: Femvincible War (Genderbent Invincible Variants)
description:
The genderbent Invincible variants from across the multiverse. Includes several individual variants. Will add more soon.

Current Variants:

Sinister Marcy
Mohawk Marcy
Prisoner Marcy
Omni Marcy
Masked Marcy
Viltrumite Marcy
Lensless Marcy
Target Marcy
Shiesty Marcy
Flaxan Marcy
Tracksuit Marcy
Long Hair Marcy
Retro Marcy
Kneepad Marcy/Marcy 19
Maskless Marcy
Light Blue Marcy
Bulletproof Marcy
Baldcap Marcy

Idk what to call them besides Marcy, I saw others call them Marie or Martha, but I don't wanna confuse the ai.

You can try using Whatsapp and YouTube Invincible, but they don't really have much info.
creator: MadPaxx
